title: Physical Modelling
subheadline: Simulating complex fluid dynamics for safe, optimized designs.
description: Scale modelling for complex engineering structures.
fullDescription: We create precise physical models to simulate real-world conditions for complex hydraulic and structural engineering projects, allowing for rigorous testing before full-scale construction.
painPoints: Numerical models (CFD) alone cannot always predict complex hydraulic phenomena like cavitation, scouring, or vibration. Clients need physical proof that massive structures will behave safely under extreme conditions.
approach: We construct scaled, highly instrumented physical models in our hydraulics lab. We run extensive flow simulations to visualize real-world behavior, optimizing the design to prevent structural failure.

caseStudy.title: Kabeli-B HEP
caseStudy.description: A run-of-river hydroelectric project located in eastern Nepal, providing clean energy to the national grid. This strategic project demonstrates excellence in sustainable energy development with comprehensive technical audit and supervision.

testimonial.quote: Seeing the physical model in action gave our international investors the ultimate confidence. CEC Nepal's lab work is world-class.
testimonial.author: David Chen
testimonial.title: Project Sponsor
